---
name: Support level promotion
about: Propose moving a surface from experimental/rfc-only to supported
labels: workstream:governance, type:governance
---

## Surface
- Surface name:
- Current status: `experimental` / `rfc-only`
- Proposed status: `supported`

## Criteria Evidence
- [ ] RFC/spec exists and reflects current implementation
- [ ] Canonical implementation is stable
- [ ] Tests cover selector/behavior baseline
- [ ] A11y expectations are documented
- [ ] Playground/docs usage examples exist
- [ ] Release/migration impact reviewed

Reference criteria:
- `docs/release/experimental-to-supported-criteria.md`

## Evidence Links
- RFC/spec:
- Implementation:
- Tests:
- A11y docs:
- Usage examples:
- Release/migration notes:

## Risks / Open Questions

## Decision Proposal
- [ ] Approve promotion
- [ ] Defer promotion
